en.text: amethyst,  a gem in the third row on the ephod,  breastplate of judgment worn by the high priest.  Transliteration of the Septuagint word.  Identification is not certain but is a purple stone perhaps a corundum or red or brown jasper.

senses.gloss_en: amethyst,  a gem in the third row on the ephod,  breastplate of judgment worn by the high priest.  Transliteration of the Septuagint word.  Identification is not certain but is a purple stone perhaps a corundum or red or brown jasper.
